case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS DAVIS, ELEANOR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-19-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-18-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TO EXPLORE POSSIBILITY OF DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE COVERAGE; IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
